opportunities.specific_product: Mr. Clean Magic Eraser Shower & Tub Scrubber Kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $12 tool erased a year of soap scum in one weekend clean
opportunities.before_state: Cloudy, soap-scum-caked glass shower doors with hard water stains
buyer_intent_keywords: how to remove soap scum from glass shower door
opportunities.why_now: RealSimple's shower-cleaning pin is actively circulating and mid-summer humidity spikes soap scum complaints, driving search spikes for fast bathroom fixes.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $35 backsplash swap made this rental kitchen look custom-built
opportunities.before_state: Dated, bare, or builder-beige kitchen backsplash wall
opportunities.after_state: Modern subway-tile backsplash installed with zero drilling or landlord pushback
buyer_intent_keywords: peel and stick backsplash renter friendly
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's renter-friendly decorating roundup (peel-and-stick tile, removable wallpaper) is trending on Pinterest right as summer move-in and lease-renewal season peaks.

opportunities.specific_product: Acacia wood paper towel holder with soap, sponge & condiment caddy
opportunities.brand: Amazon generic (consider Syruvia, 20% commission, for kitchen-tool alternatives)
opportunities.transformation_hook: $28 caddy turned a cluttered sink counter into a magazine-ready station
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered counter with loose paper towels, sponges, and bottles sprawled by the sink
opportunities.after_state: Single acacia-wood caddy neatly holding paper towels, soap, and sponge
opportunities.why_now: RealSimple just published a direct product review of this exact organizer, signaling fresh publisher interest and search volume.

opportunities.specific_product: 9ft market patio umbrella with tilt & crank
opportunities.brand: Amazon generic (Best Choice Products, 15% commission, offers patio umbrella/furniture sets)
opportunities.transformation_hook: $89 umbrella turned a bare concrete patio into a backyard cafe
opportunities.before_state: Bare, sun-scorched patio table with no shade
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor dining nook shaded by a bold-pattern market umbrella
opportunities.why_now: RealSimple's 23-umbrella roundup is live in mid-July, peak patio-shopping season with buyers actively comparing options during the sunniest stretch of summer.

opportunities.specific_product: Sliding barn door hardware kit + MDF barn door slab
opportunities.transformation_hook: $180 barn door swap replaced a hollow closet door and transformed the room
opportunities.before_state: Plain hollow-core swinging door or open closet awkwardly eating floor space
opportunities.after_state: Statement sliding barn door adding rustic-modern character and reclaiming floor space
opportunities.why_now: HGTV is actively promoting sliding barn doors as a top interior style trend across its publisher channel this week.
